articles.title: 5 times the Patriots traded for wide receivers in recent history, and how each acquisition panned out
articles.description:
Rumors of a trade for A.J. Brown continue to swirl. Here's a look back at some of New England's impactful wide receiver trades over the years.

The post 5 times the Patriots traded for wide receivers in recent history, and how each acquisition panned out appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots traded for five notable wide receivers in recent history, shaping team dynamics.
Acquisitions included Randy Moss and Wes Welker, significantly boosting offensive performance.
Current trade rumors for A.J. Brown could impact fan engagement and team strategy.

articles.title: Alex Cora not harping on late-game ejection by C.B. Bucknor: ‘We’re all human’
articles.description:
Cora was ejected in the eighth for arguing an inning-ending Trevor Story check swing strike three call.

The post Alex Cora not harping on late-game ejection by C.B. Bucknor: ‘We’re all human’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alex Cora was ejected in the eighth inning for arguing a call.
Cora disputed a check swing strike three on Trevor Story during the game.
The ejection could affect team morale and performance in upcoming games.
